recommendations.title: Auntie Edna
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Antboy
recommendations.overview: 12-year-old Pelle accidentally gets bitten by an ant and develops unimaginable superpowers. With help from his friend, comic book nerd Wilhelm, Pelle creates a secret identity as the superhero Antboy. Slowly things start to happen in the surburban co

recommendations.title: The Punch Bowl
recommendations.overview: Writer Johannes Pfeiffer who goes undercover as a student in a high school after his friends told him that he missed out on a great life experience since he was home schooled.

recommendations.title: Jack-Jack Attack
recommendations.overview: The Parrs' baby Jack-Jack is thought to be normal, not having any super-powers like his parents or siblings. But when an outsider is hired to watch him, Jack-Jack shows his true potential.

recommendations.title: Chasing Amy
recommendations.overview: Holden and Banky are comic book artists. Everything is going good for them until they meet Alyssa, also a comic book artist. Holden falls for her, but his hopes are crushed when he finds out she's a lesbian.

recommendations.title: The Thundermans Return
recommendations.overview: Twins Phoebe and Max are enjoying their superhero lifestyle, but when one 'save' goes awry, the Thundermans are sent back to Hiddenville. While Hank and Barb enjoy their return, and Billy and Nora look forward to a normal high school life, Max and Ph

recommendations.title: Strings
recommendations.overview: María's routine at school is altered by the arrival of a very special child. Soon, they become close friends.

recommendations.title: Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King
recommendations.overview: Comic Hasan Minhaj of "The Daily Show" shares personal stories about racism, immigrant parents, prom night horrors and more in this stand-up special.

recommendations.title: Artists and Models
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter begins taking inspiration from the dreams of his friend and roommate, a comic book fan who narrates an adventure story while he sleeps, but unbeknownst to the latter, the artist of his favorite comic book lives in the same buildi

recommendations.title: The Oh in Ohio
recommendations.overview: Frustrated with their relationship, Priscilla and Jack decide to take a break. While Jack moves into a new place of his own and starts dating a student, Priscilla discovers the joys of self-pleasuring and finds an unusual bedmate.
